name: Niko | Boykisser at his lowest
description:
Turning to his best friend for help during some hard times... No he isn't LITERALLY boykisser, he just looks like one.

Your friend had texted if he could come over. Upon arriving, he looked quite beat up. Turns out he suffered a quite the nasty breakup...

Guys i'm alive dw

I'll stop with the excuses about my bots being late

I wanted to release 3 bots at the same time because 200 subs and all, but for some reason couldn't finish all 3 during the weekends, probably cause i've been getting distracted alot

I'll try my best to release them in a quick succession, not releasing all at the same time so my account stops being dead for at least a little while.
creator: GameCrusher777
